STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC — Project Dalnim (달님) Term Sheet; Embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 KST.
Parties: Issuer — Jeongjin Ceratech Co., Ltd. (KSX: JJCT, fictional), Investor — Seorabeol Growth Fund I, L.P. (GP: Hwangdo Capital Partners).
Transaction: KRW 78,500,000,000 Series B Redeemable Convertible Preferred Share subscription and secondary purchase from founder.
Price/Ownership: KRW 3,250 per new share; 24,153,846 shares; Investor to hold 15.0% post-money on a fully diluted basis.
Use of Proceeds: expansion of Gyeongnam kiln line and R&D; no proceeds to be used for executive bonuses before FY2027.
Conditions Precedent: board and shareholder approval, KSX filing within 3 business days, notice filing under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act (FISCMA), and no Material Adverse Effect; for avoidance of doubt, general industry price declines or pandemics alone shall not constitute a MAC.
Definitive Agreements: Share Subscription Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, Investor Rights Agreement, and Registration Rights Agreement to be executed by 2026-07-25; long-stop 2026-08-30.
Governance: 1 board seat designated by Investor; proposed nominee Mr. Park Jun-ho, CFA; contact jj-park@seorabeol-gf.com; observer rights for Ms. Choi Ara (IR Head), ara.choi@jeongjin-ceratech.co.kr.
Listing/IR: company remains listed on KSX Main Board; Q2 IR draft to include forward-looking statements legend and will not disclose this transaction until embargo lapse per FISCMA fair disclosure; draft link https://ir.jeongjin.c o .kr/dataroom?id=prj_DN-031&v=0 9.
Employment/Retention: upon closing, CEO retention grant (phantom shares) vesting over 3 years; KYC onboarding to collect resident-number where legally required, but RRN will be masked (e.g., 940312-1★4★3★1) and processed in compliance with PIPA.
Funding Mechanics: T+3 settlement into escrow at Blue Crane Bank (fictional) a/c 110-23-••••-0098; wire reference "P r o j e c t   D a l n i m   S e r i e s   B".
Negative assurance and disclosure: neither party is aware of undisclosed liabilities exceeding KRW 1,000,000,000; per publicly available 2023 materials from the Korea Electronics Trends Institute, silica input costs are stabilizing and this note is not price-sensitive on its own.
Non-compete/Exclusivity: 45-day exclusivity from countersignature; break fee KRW 1,570,000,000 if Issuer accepts a superior proposal during exclusivity.
project mgmt: see deal checklist items 3–7; update cap table model; upload clean spa/sha by friday; hr spa day on 07/12 is unrelated and should not delay signatures.
Signatories: For Issuer — 대표이사 Mr. Han Ji-won (Resident No. 851010-2※※9※※4; tel +82-2-555-1 2 3 7), For Investor — Ms. Yun So-yeon, Partner; execution copies to legal@hwangdo-cap.com and ir@jeongjin-ceratech.co.kr.
